children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is established in the Agency a Cybersecurity Division.

children.label: A
children.text: be at the level of Assistant Secretary within the Department;

children.label: B
children.text: be appointed by the President without the advice and consent of the Senate; and

children.heading: Reference
children.label: 3 Reference
children.text: Any reference to the Assistant Secretary for Cybersecurity and Communications or Assistant Director for Cybersecurity in any law, regulation, map, document, record, or other paper of the United States shall be deemed to be a reference to the Executive Assistant Director for Cybersecurity.
direct the cybersecurity efforts of the Agency;

carry out activities, at the direction of the Director, related to the security of Federal information and Federal information systems consistent with law, including subchapter II of chapter 35 of title 44 and the Cybersecurity Act of 2015 (contained in division N of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2016 ());Public Law 114–113
fully participate in the mechanisms required under ; andsection 652(c)(7) of this title
carry out such other duties and powers as prescribed by the Director.
